title: Bacon Tomato Cups
ingredients: ½ of a medium onion, chopped
instructions:
Place mini phyllo cups into mini muffin pans.
In a skillet over medium heat, cook the bacon until crisp. Drain on a paper towel. Crumble the bacon when cool and place in a medium mixing bowl.
Add the chopped tomato, onion, cheese, mayonnaise and basil.
Fill each phyllo cup and bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
